behavioral_rules: For process learnings and feedback: create lesson artifacts in .orqa/process/lessons/ instead of auto-memory files. Use auto-memory only for user-specific preferences (user type) and external references (reference type). When an epic is scoped: sync session state steps and task list with the epic's tasks — work against the epic's defined tasks, not ad-hoc.
session_reminders: Session state MUST include the scoped epic (EPIC-XXXXXXXX) so the stop hook can check completion.
